headline: Jim Cramer Reviews the Earnings Report from Solstice Advanced Materials
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:SOLS) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on as he discussed Big Tech’s AI spending. Cramer highlighted why the stock has been a “fantastic performer,” as he commented: Last October, one of my long-time favorites, Honeywell, spun off its specialty chemical business as Solstice Advanced Materials, which […]
